name: codebase-takeover
description: Inherit a codebase you've never seen and get productive fast. Map it, assess health, review critical paths, document what's missing, and plan what to refactor first.

config.instruction: Map the entire codebase: directory structure, languages, frameworks, entry points, key modules, dependency graph, test locations.
Assess repository health: test coverage, dependency freshness, code smells, documentation gaps, CI status, security vulnerabilities.
Review the critical paths: main entry point, core business logic, data flow, error handling. Identify the riskiest code and the most important abstractions.
Write the documentation that's missing: architecture overview, how to run locally, how to deploy, key decisions and why they were made.
Plan what to refactor first. Prioritize by: risk reduction, developer experience improvement, and effort. Produce a phased refactoring roadmap.
